channel.title: MTA Subway Live Alerts
channel.description: Live real-time service alerts for the NYC Subway system

item.title: [J] trains are running with delays in both directions after we addressed a signal problem between Cypress Hills and Crescent St.
item.description: No details provided.

item.title: [6][6X] trains are running with delays in both directions while we continue to address a signal problem near Parkchester.
item.description: Parkchester-bound [6] trains will run express from 3 Av/138 St to Parkchester . Pelham Bay Park-bound [6X] will run local from 3 Av/138 St to Pelham Bay Park. If your stop is skipped, take a downtown [6] train. Listen for announcements to hear how your train will run.

item.title: [6][6X] trains are running with delays in both directions while we continue to address a signal problem near Parkchester.
item.description: Parkchester-bound [6] trains will run express from 3 Av/138 St to Parkchester . Pelham Bay Park-bound [6X] will run local from 3 Av/138 St to Pelham Bay Park. If your stop is skipped, take a downtown [6] train. Listen for announcements to hear how your train will run.

item.title: [3] trains are running with delays in both directions after we addressed a switch problem at New Lots Av.
item.description: [3] service has resumed between Pennsylvania Av and New Lots Av.

item.title: All [SIR] trains from Eltingville to Huguenot board from the St George-bound platform
item.description: Boarding change includes Eltingville, Annadale, and Huguenot stations. What's happening? Scheduled maintenance

item.title: All [SIR] trains from Grant City to Great Kills board from the St George-bound platform
item.description: Boarding change affects Grant City, New Dorp, Oakwood Heights, Bay Terrace and Great Kills stations. What's happening? Scheduled maintenance

item.title: Flushing-bound [7X] express trains run local in Queens from 74 St-Broadway to Mets-Willets Point
item.description: What's happening? Mets Home Game

item.title: In Brooklyn, no [4] between Crown Hts-Utica Av and New Lots Av
item.description:
[4] runs between Woodlawn and Crown Hts-Utica Av, the last stop.
[shuttle bus icon] Free B99 shuttle buses make stops between Crown Hts-Utica Av and New Lots Av. Transfer between [4] and [shuttle bus icon] at Crown Hts-Utica Av. What's happening? We're making accessibility improvements

item.title: [H] Rockaway Park Shuttle service is extended to/from the Rockaway Blvd [A] station during summer weekends
item.description:
[H] Rockaway Park Shuttle runs between Rockaway Blvd [A] station and Rockaway Park-Beach 116 St.
We're running longer [H] trains to make more room for beachgoers.
For Rockaway Park-Beach 116 St service, transfer between [H] and any [A] train at Rockaway Blvd.
Note: Summer service runs through Labor Day weekend; the last day will be Sep 7, Monday.

item.title: In the Bronx, [6] runs every 8 minutes between 3 Av/138 St and Pelham Bay Park The last stop for some trains from Manhattan is 3 Av/138 St
item.description:
Transfer at 3 Av-138 St to a Pelham Bay Park-bound [6] to continue your trip. What's happening? Signal maintenance
[accessibility icon] If you're on a train terminating at 3 Av-138 St, an accessible transfer is available at 125 St [accessibility icon] to the next Pelham Bay Park-bound [6].

item.title: In the Bronx, Manhattan-bound express [6X] runs local from Parkchester to 3 Av-138 St
item.description: What's happening? Track and signal maintenance

item.title: In the Bronx, Pelham Bay Park-bound express [6X] runs local from 3 Av-138 St to Parkchester
item.description: What's happening? Track and signal maintenance

item.title: In the Bronx, Manhattan-bound [6] skips Buhre Av, Middletown Rd, Westchester Sq-E Tremont Av, Zerega Av and Castle Hill Av
item.description:
For service to these stations, take the [6] to Parkchester and transfer to a Pelham Bay Park-bound [6].
For service from these stations, take the [6] to Pelham Bay Park and transfer to a Manhattan-bound [6].
Notes: [6] runs every 8 minutes in the Bronx. The last stop for some Bronx-bound trains is 3 Av-138 St. Transfer at 3 Av-138 St to a Pelham Bay Park-bound [6] to continue your trip.
[accessibility icon] If you're on a train terminating at 3 Av-138 St, an accessible transfer is available at 125 St [accessibility icon] to the next Pelham Bay Park-bound [6].
What's happening? Track maintenance

item.title: In the Bronx, Pelham Bay Park-bound [6] runs express Hunts Point Av to Pelham Bay Park
item.description:
Trains stop at Parkchester.
For service to Whitlock Av, Elder Av, Morrison Av-Soundview and St. Lawrence Av, take the [6] Parkchester and transfer to a Manhattan-bound [6].
For service to Castle Hill Av, Zerega Av, Westchester Sq-E Tremont Av, Middletown Rd and Buhre Av, take the [6] to Pelham Bay Park and transfer to a Manhattan-bound [6].
For service from these stations, take the [6] to Parkchester or Hunts Point Av and transfer to a Pelham Bay Park-bound train.
What's happening? Track maintenance

item.title: In Manhattan, uptown [4] runs local from Grand Central-42 St to 125 St
item.description:
Schedule reminder: Late night local trains also serve these stations.
What's happening? Track maintenance

item.title: [5] service ends early between Bowling Green, Manhattan and E 180 St, Bronx
item.description:
[5] trains run between Eastchester-Dyre Av and E 180 St.
[2] trains make [5] stops between E 180 St and 149 St-Grand Concourse. [4] trains make [5] stops between 149 St-Grand Concourse and Bowling Green. Transfer between trains at E 180 St [accessibility icon] | [2][5] and/or 149 St-Grand Concourse [2][4]. Approximate final departures: The last Manhattan-bound [5] departs E 180 St at 8:25 PM and 3 Av-149 St at 8:35 PM. The last Bronx-bound [5] departs Bowling Green at 9:20 PM and Grand Central-42 St at 9:35 PM.
What's happening? Track maintenance
[accessibility icon] This service change affects one or more ADA accessible stations and these travel alternatives may not be fully accessible. Please contact 511 to plan your trip.

item.title: [5] runs every 12 minutes

For service from these stations, take the [D][N] or [R] to 36 St and transfer to a Manhattan-bound [D].

item.title: In Manhattan, no [Q] between 57 St/7 Av and 96 St
item.description:
Travel alternatives: For Lexington Av/63 St, take the [F] instead. For 72 St, 86 St and 96 St, consider taking [shuttle bus icon] buses instead. M15 (along 1 Av and 2 Av) M102 and M103 (along 3 Av and Lex Av) Transfer between [Q] and [F] at 34 St-Herald Sq [accessibility icon]. Travel tip: For Second Av stations, consider nearby [6] stops along Lexington Ave. Transfer at 14 St-Union Sq.

item.title: In Brooklyn, no [J] between Crescent St and Broadway Junction
item.description:
[J] runs in two sections: 1. Between Jamaica Center-Parsons/Archer and Crescent St, every 12 minutes (days/evenings) 2. Between Broadway Junction and Broad St, every 12 minutes (days/evenings)
[shuttle bus icon] Free shuttle buses make stops between Crescent St and Broadway Junction. Transfer between [J] trains and [shuttle bus icon] buses at Crescent St and/or Broadway Junction. Travel tip: [airplane icon] For AirTrain JFK, use the Howard Beach-JFK Airport [A] station. Transfer at Broadway Junction .
What's happening? We're replacing tracks
